sequenceDiagram
    actor User
    participant Server
    User->>Server: Request
    Server-->>User: Response
---
    O        ┌────────┐
   /|\       │ Server │
   / \       └────┬───┘
  User            │
    │             │
    │ Request     │
    ├────────────►│
    │             │
    │ Response    │
    │◄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┤
    │             │
